full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase and Collagenase & Hyaluronidase by Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 19,4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17,8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of icPDC media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3,18E6/vials for a total of 4 vials

Sequentially dissociated cells: 2,62E6/vials for a total of 3 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 3,61 | 2,62
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1,95 | 1,55
 | viability [%] | 54% | 59,3%
 | size [µm] | 9,3 | 8,7
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4,87 | 2,62
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2,60 | 1,32
 | viability [%] | 53,4% | 50,5%
 | size [µm] | 9,8 | 9,0
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4,24 | 2,62
total | total [E6 cells] | 12,72 | 7,86
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2,275 | 1,435
total | live [E6 cells] | 6,825 | 4,305
 | viability [%] | 53,7% | 54,9%
